rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning, improving clarity and removing hedging.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively marks confidence and uncertainty, providing clear placeholders and acknowledging assumptions where necessary.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays strictly within the agreed scope without any drift, focusing solely on the requested revisions.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions are introduced; the text identifies and corrects potentially misleading statements.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes are traced, minor edits lack explicit annotation, falling short of full traceability.
